title: Rich Stout Potato Crumble
description: A decadent potato dish enhanced with stout, perfect for a midnight craving and also suitable as a paleo-friendly snack.

ingredients.name: 2 cups almond flour
ingredients.notes: Substitute with coconut flour for a keto-friendly option.

instructions: Combine the potato, almond flour, melted butter or ghee, and cocoa powder in a large bowl.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. If using walnuts, sprinkle them on top before baking.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Let it cool slightly before serving.
